comments.html: I had the blog post scheduled for the last decade 😜 Just kidding, pure coincidence. Thanks for pointing it out!
comments.name: Ivan Pepelnjak

comments.html: Coincidence, or did you wait to post this until the video itself was 18 years old?
comments.name: Charles M

comments.html: Great talk, thanks for sharing. I guess the pragmatism vs. idealism dilemma canot be solved, just like liberty vs. security or specialization vs. ubiquity... because as much as one can value pragmatism, going too far that road leads to unmantainable ultra-particularism without a chance for interoperability. Anyway, the simple but time-proofed extensibility model of BGP-4 sure is great.
comments.name: Bob
